audit_items.proof_trace: The serve range lower bound is correctly computed via conditional update pattern: minStartEpoch is initialized to FuluForkEpoch, then updated to currEpoch - minReqEpochs only if the latter is strictly greater, implementing max(current_epoch - MIN_EPOCHS, FULU_FORK_EPOCH) correctly. Underflow protection via currEpoch > minReqEpochs check prevents unsigned integer underflow.
